texto: Where I grew up in Vermont, there is no municipal garbage removal. You have to bring your trash to the dump every weekend. Something like three hours on Saturday morning, the entire town goes in. It is actually a very efficient place to do politics. I would go to the garbage dump, get petitions signed, give out literature, talk to voters.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robby Mook: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Where I grew up in Vermont, there is no municipal garbage removal.
